程序包的使用

  • com.alibaba.dubbo.common.extension使用的org.apache.dubbo.common.extension中的类 
    类和说明
    ExtensionFactory
    ExtensionFactory
  • org.apache.dubbo.cache使用的org.apache.dubbo.common.extension中的类 
    类和说明
    Adaptive
    Provide helpful information for ExtensionLoader to inject dependency extension instance.
    SPI
    Marker for extension interface

    Changes on extension configuration file
    Use Protocol as an example, its configuration file 'META-INF/dubbo/com.xxx.Protocol' is changed from:
    com.foo.XxxProtocol com.foo.YyyProtocol to key-value pair
    xxx=com.foo.XxxProtocol yyy=com.foo.YyyProtocol
    The reason for this change is: If there's third party library referenced by static field or by method in extension implementation, its class will fail to initialize if the third party library doesn't exist.
  • org.apache.dubbo.cache.filter使用的org.apache.dubbo.common.extension中的类 
    类和说明
    Activate
    Activate.
  • org.apache.dubbo.common.compiler使用的org.apache.dubbo.common.extension中的类 
    类和说明
    SPI
    Marker for extension interface

    Changes on extension configuration file
    Use Protocol as an example, its configuration file 'META-INF/dubbo/com.xxx.Protocol' is changed from:
    com.foo.XxxProtocol com.foo.YyyProtocol to key-value pair
    xxx=com.foo.XxxProtocol yyy=com.foo.YyyProtocol
    The reason for this change is: If there's third party library referenced by static field or by method in extension implementation, its class will fail to initialize if the third party library doesn't exist.
  • org.apache.dubbo.common.compiler.support使用的org.apache.dubbo.common.extension中的类 
    类和说明
    Adaptive
    Provide helpful information for ExtensionLoader to inject dependency extension instance.
  • org.apache.dubbo.common.config使用的org.apache.dubbo.common.extension中的类 
    类和说明
    Inject 
    SPI
    Marker for extension interface

    Changes on extension configuration file
    Use Protocol as an example, its configuration file 'META-INF/dubbo/com.xxx.Protocol' is changed from:
    com.foo.XxxProtocol com.foo.YyyProtocol to key-value pair
    xxx=com.foo.XxxProtocol yyy=com.foo.YyyProtocol
    The reason for this change is: If there's third party library referenced by static field or by method in extension implementation, its class will fail to initialize if the third party library doesn't exist.

    com.foo.XxxProtocol com.foo.YyyProtocol to key-value pair
    xxx=com.foo.XxxProtocol yyy=com.foo.YyyProtocol
    The reason for this change is: If there's third party library referenced by static field or by method in extension implementation, its class will fail to initialize if the third party library doesn't exist.

    The reason for this change is: If there's third party library referenced by static field or by method in extension implementation, its class will fail to initialize if the third party library doesn't exist.

    The reason for this change is: If there's third party library referenced by static field or by method in extension implementation, its class will fail to initialize if the third party library doesn't exist.
  • org.apache.dubbo.common.extension使用的org.apache.dubbo.common.extension中的类 
    类和说明
    ExtensionLoader
    ApplicationModel, DubboBootstrap and this class are at present designed to be singleton or static (by itself totally static or uses some static fields).
    Inject.InjectType 
    LoadingStrategy 
    SPI
    Marker for extension interface

    Changes on extension configuration file
    Use Protocol as an example, its configuration file 'META-INF/dubbo/com.xxx.Protocol' is changed from:
    com.foo.XxxProtocol com.foo.YyyProtocol to key-value pair
    xxx=com.foo.XxxProtocol yyy=com.foo.YyyProtocol
    The reason for this change is: If there's third party library referenced by static field or by method in extension implementation, its class will fail to initialize if the third party library doesn't exist.
  • org.apache.dubbo.common.extension.factory使用的org.apache.dubbo.common.extension中的类

    Provide helpful information for ExtensionLoader to inject dependency extension instance.

    The reason for this change is: If there's third party library referenced by static field or by method in extension implementation, its class will fail to initialize if the third party library doesn't exist.
  • org.apache.dubbo.registry.integration使用的org.apache.dubbo.common.extension中的类 
    类和说明
    SPI
    Marker for extension interface

    Changes on extension configuration file
    Use Protocol as an example, its configuration file 'META-INF/dubbo/com.xxx.Protocol' is changed from:
    com.foo.XxxProtocol com.foo.YyyProtocol to key-value pair
    xxx=com.foo.XxxProtocol yyy=com.foo.YyyProtocol
    The reason for this change is: If there's third party library referenced by static field or by method in extension implementation, its class will fail to initialize if the third party library doesn't exist.
  • org.apache.dubbo.registry.status使用的org.apache.dubbo.common.extension中的类 
    类和说明
    Activate
    Activate.
  • org.apache.dubbo.registry.zookeeper使用的org.apache.dubbo.common.extension中的类 
    类和说明

    Use Protocol as an example, its configuration file 'META-INF/dubbo/com.xxx.Protocol' is changed from:
    com.foo.XxxProtocol com.foo.YyyProtocol to key-value pair
    xxx=com.foo.XxxProtocol yyy=com.foo.YyyProtocol
    The reason for this change is: If there's third party library referenced by static field or by method in extension implementation, its class will fail to initialize if the third party library doesn't exist.
